indications.text:
1.1 Treatment of Postmenopausal Osteoporosis
Miacalcin nasal spray is indicated for the treatment of postmenopausal osteoporosis in women
greater than 5 years postmenopause. Fracture reduction efficacy has not been demonstrated.
Miacalcin nasal spray should be reserved for patients for whom alternat...
